column1: Cairo__________the capital of Egypt. It______________on the banks on the Nile River. (BE/STAND)
The River Seine____________through the centre of Paris. (FLOW)
"___________the princess____________this way?" he asked. "Yes", said the people. "She_____________this way only ten minutes ago." (PASS/PASS)
A pronoun is any word that___________a noun in a sentence. (REPLACE)
You use the past continuous tense to talk about something that____________and________________yet. (HAPPEN/NOT FINISH)
He was angry. He______________the letter and___________it in the bin. (TAKE/THROW)
The Amazon River basin__________at the heart of South America. (LIE)
A mammoth is an animal that____________a long time ago but no longer_________ . (LIVE/EXIST)
